# Admin Dashboard UI: Customer List & Email Recipient

## Description
Implement the frontend UI for the admin dashboard to display:
1. A responsive table showing a list of recent customers who booked or took an appointment (UI only, no backend yet).
2. An "Email Recipient" menu/page where the admin can view, add, edit, or delete the email address that receives booking notifications (UI only).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Dashboard shows a mobile-friendly, modern table of customer bookings (dummy data for now)
- Table columns: Name, Email, Booking Type, Date, Time, Details
- "Email Recipient" menu/page with list of emails, and UI for add/edit/delete (no backend)
- All UI is responsive and looks good on mobile and desktop
- No backend integration yet; use placeholder/dummy data

## Checklist
- [ ] Customer list table UI on dashboard
- [ ] Email recipient management UI
- [ ] Responsive/mobile-first design
- [ ] Dummy data for both sections
- [ ] PR created and merged after review

---

**Branching:**
- Create a feature branch: `feature/admin-dashboard-ui`
- Open a PR to main after implementation
- Merge after review
